post.description:
Start a debug session for a set of resources across the participating
subscriptions. The action is a subscription-level provider action rooted at
the URL subscription; every requested resource must belong to the URL
subscription or to one of the declared additional subscriptions.

DebugSessionAuthorizationMode.description: The mode used to authorize a debug session.

values.name: ArmParticipatingSubscriptionRead
values.description:
The debug session was authorized by evaluating subscription read access
across every participating subscription.

DebugSessionDisposition.description: Indicates whether a debug session was newly created or resumed.

values.name: Created
values.description: The call created a new debug session.

values.name: Resumed
values.description: The call returned an existing matching debug session.

DebugSessionSandbox.description: The sandbox connection details for a debug session.

sandboxId.description: The identifier of the provisioned sandbox.

endpoint.description: The WebSocket endpoint used to connect to the debug sandbox.

expiresAt.description: The time at which the sandbox connection expires.

StartDebugSessionRequest.description: The request body for starting a debug session.

properties.description: The properties of the debug session to start.

StartDebugSessionRequestProperties.description: The properties used to start a debug session.

additionalSubscriptionResourceIds.description:
The full `/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}` resource IDs of the other
subscriptions participating in the debug session. The subscription in the
action URL is always a participant and must not be repeated here.

items.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

armResourceIds.description:
The non-empty list of exact ARM resource IDs authorized for the debug
session. Every resource must belong to the URL subscription or to one of the
subscriptions listed in `additionalSubscriptionResourceIds`.

items.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

StartDebugSessionResponse.description: The result of starting a debug session.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the debug session.

sessionDisposition.description: Indicates whether this call created a new debug session or resumed an existing one.

authorizationMode.description: The mode used to authorize the debug session.

participatingSubscriptionResourceIds.description:
The full `/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}` resource IDs of every
subscription participating in the debug session, including the URL
subscription.

items.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

authorizedResourceIds.description: The list of ARM resource IDs authorized for the debug session.

items.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

sandbox.description: The sandbox connection details for the debug session.
